description: Groq provides AI inference services and developer tooling for running large language and multimodal models. Its platform includes hosted model APIs, tool-use features, and console-based account management.
summary: Groq exposes a public OpenAI-compatible HTTP API at `https://api.groq.com/openai/v1`, authenticated with a Groq API key sent as `Authorization: Bearer ...`; no public GraphQL API, MCP server endpoint, or first-party CLI was found.
